feed.title: SAP Community - SAP HANA
feed.subtitle: SAP HANA Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Browser Cache Logon Issue
entry.content: Our quality instance has 3 clients.  When a user is in one QS instance client called 100 and logs out and then opens another URL in the same QS instance but different client called 200 the system logs them in like they are in the second URL client but they are still actually in the first client.  If we clear the browser cache it corrects this issue.  We are using Azure SSO to authenticate.  We temporarily created a script for the user to run that clears their browser cache and then opens the URL but this is not a long term solution.  Has anyone run across this and how have you resolved it?

entry.title: BW Bridge: In what schema can I find table TFACS?
entry.content:
Hello,

I have a requirement to use the WORKDAYS_BETWEEN function an AMDP transformation routine in BW Bridge. I get an error that the TFACS table cannot be found in the schema when I try to load some data. I found the TFACS table in BW Bridge using the search, but there is no schema mentioned there. Also, when I try to preview the data of TFACS, I get an error that I'm not authorized to do so. I used the Datasphere Database Explorer as an alternative to test my SQL, but I get the same error. Any idea of how I can find the schema and resolve this issue?

entry.title: dynamic selection disabled in VA05
entry.content:
Dear Experts,
VA05 > EDIT > DYNAMIC SELECTIONS 

The Dynamic selection option in VA05 is grayed. My account has the parameter "SD_VARIANT_MAINTAIN" and tried to change it to X/A/U but unfortunately it won't turn on the Dynamic Selection button.

Is there any option to fix this?

Thank you in advance.

Best regards,

-Jaspher

entry.title: MRP-Type(Dismm) Field usage issue in Structure
entry.content:
Hello All

In custom structure where i have a field DISMM(MRP-type) which is causing an ATC P1 issue 
Short text : SAP S/4HANA Simplification Item SI_PP14: Logistics_PP-MRP - Forecast Based Plann
Note : 3211383
I have used this structure in my report and due to usage of it , i am getting an ATC issue in structure
I want to know how i can deal with this issue, i need a field DISMM in report which has been fetched from marc and displaying to user through ALV i can't remove the field i need it and i am unable to find a solution or else pragmas.
So can anyone who has worked on S4 Hana Migration help me out 

Thanks in Advance

#ABAP #S4 Hana #MRP Type #ATC #CCA  #SAP Technical  #MRP #dismm

entry.title: SD: Material XXX does not exist in warehouse XXX Message No.: V1392
entry.content:
Hello everyone

I'm entering an order in TRX VA01, but when I place the material, it shows an error: Material XXX does not exist in warehouse P010. Message number: V1392. I'm seeing the error because I have the material stored in warehouse P011, and I need to send it to that warehouse.

Is there some extra configuration where it's taking warehouse P010 instead of P011?

Thank you for your help.

entry.title: EDI PO to SO questions - How to remove segment E1EDKA1 LS and how to derive a different qualifier?
entry.content:
Hi Gurus,

I am recently working in some EDI integration scenarios to automate the sales order creation and I have two small questions I haven't been able to find an answer:

  1. Outbound IDOC message type that I am sending (and receiving on the receiving side) is ORDERS05. I can see that a segment for partner LS is created although it is not a real partner function in the sales order. Whenver I am getting the inbound IDOC, I am getting error that "Partner type LS is not permitted". Is it possible to remove this segment from my outbound Idoc or is it something we should do on the CPI side? 
  2. A more generic question regarding qualifiers: can anyone explain how the system decides which qualifier to use in a segment? Is that something we can do in configuration or is it only something ABAP can do in the code of the FM?

I am asking specifically because I want segment E1EDP19 to change from qualifier 001 to 002.

 

 

Thanks!!!

entry.title: Fiori-Style Analytics Dashboard: 'Invalid Username/Password' Error for Non-Manager Users
entry.content:
After logging into SAP Business One, our system automatically loads the Fiori-style Analytics dashboard (Pervasive Analytics). While the Manager user has no issues accessing the dashboard, other users consistently receive an "Invalid Username/Password" error when the dashboard loads.

Details:

  • SAP Business One Version: Sap Business One 10 FP 2502
  • Database: SAP HANA (SLD connection user is SYSTEM)  - version Hana 2.00.059
  • Issue: After successful login to SAP Business One, the Fiori-style dashboard attempts to load and fails for non-manager users with the error "Invalid Username/Password".
  • Manager User: Works perfectly without any errors.
  • Other Users: Despite having the required permissions for analytics, they are facing authentication issues only with the dashboard.

What I've Checked/Done:

  • User Permissions: Verified that all affected users have the necessary authorizations for Analytics and Pervasive Analytics.
  • SLD & Database Connection: Confirmed that the SLD database connection user is SYSTEM, which has all required privileges.

My Questions:

  1. What could cause the "Invalid Username/Password" error for non-manager users when accessing the Fiori-style dashboard, given that the Manager user works fine??
  2. Are there any known configuration settings or workarounds for ensuring that all users benefit from the SYSTEM user's privileges (like PAL_ROLE and AFL execution rights) when accessing Analytics?

entry.title: Hi Venkatesh,We also facing similar issue for ecc to S/4Hana conversion. What was the resolution?
entry.content: We are stuck at the same phase and SUM is running for more than 1 day. Could you please help

entry.title: SUM prerequisite Extended check is stuck at phase CONFLICT_CHECK
entry.content:
Hello All,

We are performing ECC 6.0 EHP 7 to S/4HANA 2023 FPS02 conversion and we have run sum extended prerequisite check. SUM is stuck at phase PREP_EXTENTION/CONFLICT_CHECK for more than 24 hours. No logs are getting updated in CONFLCHK.LOG and SUM is not even throwing any error. We have restarted the SUM session again but same issue.

Could you please provide any suggestion.

Thanks,

entry.title: SAP HANA Flowgraphs: What SQL Statements are executed?
entry.content:
Hi,

We have some more complex flowgraphs and think about to move them to procedures. But, we would like to know, what SQL statements is being executed. Do you have any idea to get them with easy effort?

Thank you.

entry.title: RFQ Output Status Stuck at 'To be Output' in Manage RFQ Fiori App
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I am reaching out for help regarding an issue I encountered in the Manage RFQ Fiori app while processing a Request for Quotation (RFQ). If anyone has faced a similar situation or has insights on how to resolve it, your input would be greatly appreciated.

Issue Description

After following the standard process to create and publish an RFQ, I noticed that the Output Details status is not updating as expected. Here are the steps I followed:

  1. Created an RFQ in the Manage RFQ app.

  2. Published the RFQ successfully.

  3. Observed the Output Details: Instead of showing "Completed," the status remains as "To be Output."

  4. Also its not triggering a mail in SOST.

Expected Behavior

Once the RFQ is published, the Output Details status should change to "Completed" if the process has executed successfully as well as its should trigger the mail in SOST.

Possible Causes (Assumptions)

I suspect that one of the following might be causing the issue:

  • Check OPD Transaction: Verify that all configurations in OPD (Output Parameter Determination) are correctly set up and assigned to the appropriate output types.

Request for Help

Has anyone encountered a similar issue in Manage RFQ? If so, what steps did you take to resolve it?

Any guidance or troubleshooting steps would be greatly appreciated! Looking forward to your expert insights.

Thank you in advance!

entry.title: Will CDS DCL generate an SU53 authorization error if PFCG-based access is missing?
entry.content:
Hi all,

I'm working with a CDS Data Control Language (DCL) role defined as follows:

define role ZI_Order_DCL {
  grant
    select
  on
    ZI_Order
  where ( salesorg ) =
    aspect pfcg_auth ( V_VBAK_VKO, VKORG, ACTVT = '03' );
}

If a user lacks the required V_VBAK_VKO authorization in their PFCG roles, will an SU53 authorization failure be triggered when they try to access the CDS view ZI_Order? Or DCL  is only used to restrict the data output of the CDS view?

Thanks in advance
Unni

entry.title: Performance Issues when loading and exporting data from a custom table via SE16N
entry.content:
We are unable to load and export the same amount of data from a custom table in SE16N as we are in the non-upgraded environments. The system will time out with an ABAP runtime error. Further details are in the attachment.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Delta extraction is not working in SAP Datasphere
entry.content: I have used CDS View Entity for delta extraction and also used all the annotations. But delta load is not working. Is delta load not work for CDS View Entity?

entry.title: ABAP DUMP 'SAPLV13A' DBSQL_DUPLICATE_KEY_ERROR. How to handle this DUMP in SAP
entry.content: This happens when condition for which we are loading this per 0 scale value. The purpose is so that when the quantity of the material group on the order reaches 5000 plus they no longer pay the freight surcharge rate.

entry.title: In SAP S/4HANA, what are the changes in the Real Estate Flex module?
entry.content: In SAP S/4HANA, what are the changes in the Real Estate Flex module?

entry.title: doubts with table USR40
entry.content:
Greetings, dear friends
I have a question: If wildcards are added to the USR40 table, would they directly impact existing users in the system? For example,
if an existing user has a password with the newly added wildcards, would they be forced to change their password?
Thank you.

entry.title: How to map AD group to roles in HANA Cockpit
entry.content:
How the AD group are mapped with the standard roles available in the HANA Cockpit also need to know how to get the details of user to role. 

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Allocation Number on Bank Statement SAP HANA
entry.content:
Hello everyone

I'm in the Bank Statement Management application F1564, where I ran the transaction and entered the assignment number as 0. However, when I check FB03, it saves a different assignment number. I made the correction manually.

Bank Statement

FB03

Is that number generated automatically? How can I correct it so it shows the bank statement assignment number?

SAP S/4HANA Finance

entry.title: HANA ODBC Test Connection Error
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I'm currently trying to establish an ODBC connection to a SAP HANA Cloud database, I need this to connect the data to a Microsoft PowerBI report. However, no matter what I try, the following message appears everytime I try to test the connection:

"Communication Link Failure:-10709 connection failed (RTE:[89006] system call 'connect' failed, rc=10061, No connection could be made because the target machine actively refused it)."

Please consider the following:

  • My computer can successfully ping the SAP Hana server I'm trying to connect to, via cmd.
  • The credentials needed to test the ODBC connection are disregarded, it makes no difference if I use the correct credentials or purposefully wrong ones, the connection will show the same error.

Any help or advice is greatly appreciated.

Thanks,

Daniel.
